  - \textbf{Commonsense reasoning puzzles:} require understanding real-world situations and making inferences based on implicit knowledge | papers: 256ef1f8d0ea2982cc50d3e85e5f1b4920f037fe; 194e8cb8f2b4673d467c01d010afba31551cb0da; 4776de7b856d3b15eecc4f88666cdc13972df22e
    - \textbf{Rule-based puzzles:} provide explicit victory conditions, legal move sets or state transition rules that the model must follow to solve the puzzle | papers: 946e213164cccf15bc3f4ff776d81369dbae1b77; deb7c1867cc5ec4ab51f67f84b7ffb8fc949ddf4; f021aebbc4c8d38f55470ad11bfb1a2c59b788a7; ff406e2ab8fdcce6b051cad1ead794c928440f77; 69581fa1f7eacad35d8528c7f8527ed27a6f94c1; b783168c885ecbae0fccdb46ec8e9afd0ef99b7f; 24d52678c887331b9da0368e8a2f58bec07f7203; 0639e2e209213ecb54eb4d6555e271d070344842; 8575d181953d63646d3f0453910ea30ff13e09af; b9a1189f2de7fd5e66551d7c425556e5642b823a; 4a6d7b11c4aba5a23f68856989366dd4311e960b; 33986e5964f025a4f8343322149ef66cf194b5da; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 1c27f107b171ae2578e0a8061c7aa34cd635f51a; 8b723be33e62bf5bd9278769244f1c13a9510898; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820
  - \textbf{Programming puzzles:} involve analyzing or modifying code snippets to achieve a specific goal | papers: 850d691e5f97001012fc323173635374d0a45ea9; 921dace8bf038a34cba5473a72abc8cf65d61e03
    - \textbf{Deterministic games:} provide all the information needed to produce an outcome from a given starting state and set of actions | papers: 0639e2e209213ecb54eb4d6555e271d070344842; 8575d181953d63646d3f0453910ea30ff13e09af; b9a1189f2de7fd5e66551d7c425556e5642b823a; 4a6d7b11c4aba5a23f68856989366dd4311e960b; f021aebbc4c8d38f55470ad11bfb1a2c59b788a7; 33986e5964f025a4f8343322149ef66cf194b5da; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 1c27f107b171ae2578e0a8061c7aa34cd635f51a; 8b723be33e62bf5bd9278769244f1c13a9510898; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820
      - \textbf{Stochastic games:} incorporate randomness or hidden information, resulting in different outcomes | papers: 946e213164cccf15bc3f4ff776d81369dbae1b77; deb7c1867cc5ec4ab51f67f84b7ffb8fc949ddf4; f021aebbc4c8d38f55470ad11bfb1a2c59b788a7; ff406e2ab8fdcce6b051cad1ead794c928440f77; 69581fa1f7eacad35d8528c7f8527ed27a6f94c1; b783168c885ecbae0fccdb46ec8e9afd0ef99b7f; 24d52678c887331b9da0368e8a2f58bec07f7203
      - \textbf{Riddles:} use wordplay and metaphors to conceal the answers, requiring abstract connections and lateral thinking | papers: 62ee2d23968b8ee97c958d75ae2b6ae13c84da1a; 71fab1ce3c66998ba681ab378484be77690327a9; 4776de7b856d3b15eecc4f88666cdc13972df22e; db4906c7cc08cfd324bcc8a78a8faa747b78ddff; 4f7c4a9d73f6d18f4bbb4424c7f8a16df45df474; 1e5743366625128e225879dbcfb568f6b8f1bcdc
    - \textbf{Rule-less puzzles:} rely more on flexible thinking, real-world knowledge and inferential reasoning | papers: 256ef1f8d0ea2982cc50d3e85e5f1b4920f037fe; 194e8cb8f2b4673d467c01d010afba31551cb0da; 4776de7b856d3b15eecc4f88666cdc13972df22e; 850d691e5f97001012fc323173635374d0a45ea9; 921dace8bf038a34cba5473a72abc8cf65d61e03; 62ee2d23968b8ee97c958d75ae2b6ae13c84da1a; 71fab1ce3c66998ba681ab378484be77690327a9; db4906c7cc08cfd324bcc8a78a8faa747b78ddff; 4f7c4a9d73f6d18f4bbb4424c7f8a16df45df474; 1e5743366625128e225879dbcfb568f6b8f1bcdc
